text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You wanna plan out a day to train<n>together?!

Yeah! Urara's just way too hyper all<n>the time, so
we really need someone<n>to keep things chill!
Whaddya think?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! I was in the middle of<n>saying how we
should swim to that<n>island over there and have an
adventure!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-you can, um, come too if you want,<n>Taishin...
B-but only if you want!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Seems like you're in for a fun summer camp!
Seems like you're in for a fun summer camp!

text_block_list.text:
My third summer camp with Narita<n>Taishin begins
today!
